investigations.title: The Carer's Allowance Cliff-Edge
investigations.excerpt: A carer paying back nearly £20,000 in Carer's Allowance after going over the earnings limit without realising told MoneySavingExpert.com the experience has left her "devastated".

investigations.title: MoneySaver's 'unbelievable' refund from Complete Savings – check if you can get a refund
investigations.excerpt: MoneySaver Ray secured a £675 refund from Complete Savings after reading our warning about the 'cashback with a catch' site's misleading 'click to claim' ads. And Ray's not the only one, as we've been swamped with similar successes.

investigations.title: Misleading 'Complete Savings' ads BANNED after MSE complaint
investigations.excerpt: Misleading 'Complete Savings' ads have been banned following a complaint by MoneySavingExpert.com (MSE). The 'cashback with a catch' site often pops up when you check out online at Argos, Papa Johns and Trainline. MSE founder Martin Lewis has urged shoppers to check their statements NOW to make sure they're not unknowingly shelling out each month.

investigations.title: Warning: The top 20 celebs used by scammers – beware ads featuring Martin Lewis, Taylor Swift, Elon Musk & more
investigations.excerpt: If you see an online advert, particularly if it features a celebrity, always assume it could be a scam. That's a warning from Martin Lewis after our exclusive analysis of Action Fraud data found that the MoneySavingExpert.com (MSE) founder, alongside Taylor Swift and Elon Musk, is the most featured public figure in reports to it.

investigations.title: Households owed £141 million in council tax overpayments
investigations.excerpt: If you moved home and started paying council tax to a different local authority, you could be one of 808,000 households in England, Scotland and Wales who are owed a share of over £141 million in overpaid council tax, an investigation by MoneySavingExpert.com (MSE) has found.
